title: Polyrhythm Studio
description: 5 circular rhythm tracks with independent beat divisions — tap to activate beats, hear them synthesized live, export WAV.
concept: A geometric polyrhythm machine visualized as five concentric rings, each with its own beat count and synthesized voice. Click any dot on a ring to activate or silence that beat. The single rotating playhead sweeps all rings simultaneously, firing kick, snare, hi-hat, bell, and sub bass as it crosses active dots. Configure divisions (2–8) per track, tune volume, mute tracks, adjust BPM, then export 4 bars as a WAV download.
features: 5 independent rhythm tracks with configurable beat divisions (2–8)
Live synthesis: kick, snare, hi-hat, bell, sub bass via Web Audio API
Click/tap concentric rings to toggle individual beats
WAV export of 4 bars via OfflineAudioContext
BPM slider with live retiming, per-track volume and mute

interaction.mouse: Click dots on rings to toggle beats
interaction.click: Transport buttons: play, record WAV, share link
